name: Franklin D. Murphy Sculpture Garden
description: Five-acre outdoor sculpture garden with works by Calder, Rodin, Noguchi, Matisse, and Miro. Benches, shaded tables, and grass areas. Jacaranda trees bloom in spring.
food_nearby: Cafe 451 (YRL) and North Campus Student Center
times_note: General estimate based on typical university patterns. Actual occupancy varies by term, week, and day.
